prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock turbochargers on the **K20C4** (2.0L turbo inline-4) with **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbos, featuring a 71mm compressor wheel and 62mm turbine wheel, paired with a **PRL Motorsports Stage 3 turbo manifold** and **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegates** for precise boost control up to 28 psi. Upgrade the fuel system with **Injector Dynamics ID1700x** injectors and a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump** to support 600+ WHP.

Drivetrain: Install a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** in the front differential and a **Wavetrac torque-biasing LSD** in the rear to maximize power delivery. Pair with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** twin-disc clutch and **PRL Motorsports short-throw shifter** for faster, more precise gear changes. Strengthen the half-shafts with **Neuspeed Carbon Fiber Driveshafts** to handle increased torque.

Suspension & Handling: Replace the stock suspension with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (TLX-specific valving) and **SuperPro 80mm front/rear sway bars** to reduce body roll. Install **Brembo GT 6-piston 405mm front and 4-piston 380mm rear brake kits** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for aggressive stopping power. Use **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect** tires (255/35R19 front, 285/30R19 rear) on **TE37VOLK Racing wheels** (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear) for optimal grip.
estetica: Aero: Install the **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS TLX Type S widebody kit** with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler. Add a **Seibon Carbon fiber hood** with a functional **PRL Motorsports dual-core intercooler** and **custom carbon fiber front splitter** with integrated canards. Use **Vortex Generators** on the roof for improved high-speed stability.

Exterior: Apply a **3M Matte Military Green (M227) vinyl wrap** with **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** in black. Replace the stock headlights with **Morimoto XB LED Projector headlights** and add **Anzo USA LED taillights** with sequential turn signals. Install **OEM+ Acura NSX-style side markers** and **custom carbon fiber mirror caps** from **Seibon**.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with **Recaro SPG XL bucket seats** (Acura-specific mounting brackets) and a **NRG Innovations FRP-300 quick-release steering wheel** with a **Momo suede cover**. Add **Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses** and a **Sparco 6-point bolt-in roll cage** (TLX-specific design). Use **Alcantara door cards** with **LED ambient lighting** and a **custom carbon fiber center console** housing a **AEM CD-7 dash display**.
